title: DotGlobeHero Component
content:
## DotGlobeHero Component This component renders a full-screen hero section with a dynamic, wireframe globe in the background. It uses `@react-three/fiber` and `@react-three/drei` for 3D rendering. ### Purpose The `DotGlobeHero` component is designed to provide an engaging and visually appealing hero section for web applications. It features a customizable 3D globe that rotates, creating a sense of depth and dynamism. ### Key Exports * `DotGlobeHero`: The main React component for the globe hero. It accepts various props to customize its appearance and behavior. * `DotGlobeHeroProps`: The TypeScript interface defining the props accepted by the `DotGlobeHero` component. ### Props * `rotationSpeed` (optional, `number`): Controls the speed of the globe's rotation. Defaults to `0.005`. * `globeRadius` (optional, `number`): Determines the radius of the globe. Defaults to `1`. * `className` (optional, `string`): Allows for custom CSS classes to be applied to the main container div. * `children` (optional, `React.ReactNode`): Any React nodes to be rendered in the foreground, above the globe. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { DotGlobeHero } from '@/components/ui/globe-hero'; function MyHeroSection() { return (

Welcome to DocMed

 ); } export default MyHeroSection; ``` ### Internal Components * `Globe`: A sub-component responsible for rendering the 3D globe geometry and materials. It takes `rotationSpeed` and `radius` as props. ### Technical Details * The component utilizes `use client` directive, indicating it's a client-side component. * `@react-three/fiber` is used to integrate Three.js into React. * `@react-three/drei` provides helpful abstractions like `PerspectiveCamera`. * `cn` utility is used for conditional class merging. * The globe is rendered using `sphereGeometry` and `meshBasicMaterial` with `wireframe` and `transparent` properties for a distinct visual style. * `useFrame` hook from `@react-three/fiber` is used to animate the globe's rotation within the animation loop. * The `DotGlobeHero` component forwards a ref to its main container `div`.
